title: hieracium tigrinum
intro: Hieracium tigrinum, also known as tiger's head hawkweed, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family that is native to mountainous regions in Europe and Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, inflammation, and digestive issues, due to its high content of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Hieracium tigrinum include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Hieracium tigrinum, such as infusions and tinctures, can be used to make teas, salves, and creams for topical application.
